ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. THOMAS D'AMATO, Esq. of D'Amato Law Corporation (tel: 925-317-1300) Plaintiff Collectiv MX LLC dba Baja Beach Fest.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

Matter discussed. The Court notes only plaintiff's counsel is present. The Court inquires plaintiff's counsel as to whether the defendant has been notified of this hearing. Counsel Thomas D'Amato states the defendant has been notified and a proof of service has been submitted for filing. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants preliminary injunction.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
